description_long: This rifle features a blocky, minimalist design with a rectangular main body in a light gray color. The barrel is elongated and dark gray, extending from the front of the receiver, and appears to have a squared-off muzzle. A prominent, angular grip in dark gray is attached beneath the receiver, positioned at a steep angle. The top of the receiver has a raised rectangular section, possibly representing a mounting rail or sight base. The overall construction is geometric and stylized, with no visible moving parts or detailed mechanisms. The rifle's appearance suggests a modern, utilitarian firearm suitable for urban environments.
description: A blocky, light gray rifle with a long dark barrel, angular grip, and a raised section on top, featuring a minimalist, geometric design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the square muzzle opening and the alignment of the barrel with the main body.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long barrel, rectangular receiver, raised top section, and angled grip.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the receiver and the alignment of the barrel and grip.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with the grip and raised top section visible.
